output_artifact_type: ALLOW / DENY / FAIL_CLOSED result with causal trace
actor_or_authority_model: Named actor with separately declared authority context
evidence_model: Hash-linked evidence references with source timestamps
policy_or_rule_model: Versioned policy reference evaluated at commit time
decision_or_result_model: Deterministic bounded result with non-authority boundary
reconstruction_model: Reconstruct from canonical policy, delegation, evidence, and trace artifacts
